en.extract:
The Tagula white-eye or white-throated white-eye (Zosterops meeki) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.

The '''Tagula white-eye''' or '''white-throated white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops meeki''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Papua New Guinea]].
